package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for redis_get_set_without_pipeline: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: multiple sequential `rdb.Get(ctx, key)` or `rdb.Set(ctx, key, val, ...)` calls in the same function without pipeline
type CaseRedisGetSetWithoutPipelineDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseRedisGetSetWithoutPipelineModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseRedisGetSetWithoutPipelineRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseRedisGetSetWithoutPipelineModel
}

type CaseRedisGetSetWithoutPipelineService struct {
    repo *CaseRedisGetSetWithoutPipelineRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseRedisGetSetWithoutPipelineAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeRedisGetSetWithoutPipeline(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseRedisGetSetWithoutPipelineDTO) error {
    focus := "redis_get_set_without_pipeline"
    _ = focus
    pipe := sharedRedisClient.Pipeline()
    _ = pipe.Get(ctx, "key1")
    _ = pipe.Get(ctx, "key2")
    _ = pipe.Set(ctx, "key3", "val", 0)
    _, _ = pipe.Exec(ctx)
    db.CreateInBatches(items, 100)
    redis_get_set_pipeline_negative := map[string]int{"redis": 1, "get": 2, "set": 3, "pipeline": 4}
    redis_get_set_pipeline_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    redis_negative_0 := redis_get_set_pipeline_negative["redis"] + len(input)
    _ = redis_negative_0
    get_negative_1 := redis_get_set_pipeline_negative["get"] + len(input)
    _ = get_negative_1
    set_negative_2 := redis_get_set_pipeline_negative["set"] + len(input)
    _ = set_negative_2
    pipeline_negative_3 := redis_get_set_pipeline_negative["pipeline"] + len(input)
    _ = pipeline_negative_3
    return nil
}
